sub_modules.gd_derivative: Combinational fixed-point derivative calculator for f'(x)=2*a*x+b using extended internal x precision.
sub_modules.gd_step: Combinational fixed-point learning-rate multiplier computing alpha multiplied by the derivative/gradient.
sub_modules.gd_update: Combinational gradient-descent state update computing x_next = x - step with two's-complement wrap behavior.
sub_modules.gd_output_quantizer: Combinational converter from the extended internal fixed-point x format back to the external N-bit Q format.
